nodes.name: select.tsx
nodes.summary: Radix-based Select UI primitive set (trigger, content, item, label, separator) re-exported for use across forms and dialogs.
nodes.languageNotes: Wraps Radix UI primitives with Tailwind styling and forwardRef.

nodes.name: tabs.tsx
nodes.summary: Radix-based Tabs UI primitives (Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent) with Tailwind styling.

nodes.name: textarea.tsx
nodes.summary: Styled Textarea UI primitive with forwardRef for use in forms.

nodes.name: webFileHandles.ts
nodes.summary: Module-level cache holding the active File System Access API handle for the current web project file.

nodes.name: webProjectFileIO.ts
nodes.summary: Browser project file I/O using the File System Access API with download fallback for saving and opening serialized project files.
nodes.languageNotes: Feature-detects showOpenFilePicker/showSaveFilePicker and falls back to anchor download.

nodes.name: BackupManager.ts
nodes.summary: Manages creation, restoration, listing, and cleanup of project backups in storage, including pre-migration snapshots and rollback.

nodes.name: systemTemplateService.ts
nodes.summary: Service that manages HVAC system calculation-setting templates: default templates, CRUD operations, and applying templates to settings.

nodes.name: AccordionLibrary.tsx
nodes.summary: Accordion-based component library panel listing fittings and unified components grouped for drag/insert onto the canvas.

nodes.name: BulkEditDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog for editing properties of multiple selected canvas entities at once with tabbed fields and component resolution.

nodes.name: CalculationSettingsDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Large tabbed dialog for configuring HVAC calculation settings, integrating system templates and persisting to the settings store.

nodes.name: DuctSizePromptDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Prompt dialog for entering duct dimensions (round/rectangular) when drawing or sizing a duct run on the canvas.

nodes.name: DuctToolOptionsPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Inline options panel controlling duct-drawing tool settings (shape, size, endpoints) bound to the canvas store.

nodes.name: EquipmentPlacementDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog for selecting and configuring HVAC equipment before placing it on the canvas, with auto-incrementing names.

nodes.name: TabbedPropertiesPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Inspector panel that organizes entity property editors into tabs.

nodes.name: ResolutionWizard.tsx
nodes.summary: Wizard dialog guiding the user through resolving validation issues for components on the canvas.

nodes.name: ServiceEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Editor dialog for creating and updating HVAC services/components, mapping form data to unified component material types.

nodes.name: ServiceList.tsx
nodes.summary: Lists configured HVAC services/components with badges and edit/delete actions backed by the component library store.

nodes.name: SystemTemplateSelector.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog for browsing and applying system calculation-setting templates, including default and custom templates.

nodes.name: ConfirmDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Generic confirmation dialog with configurable title, message, and confirm/cancel actions.

nodes.name: DeleteConfirmDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Confirmation dialog for deleting a project, requiring typed confirmation and invoking the project list store.

nodes.name: EditProjectDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog for editing project metadata and settings, persisting through the project list and project stores.

nodes.name: NewProjectDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog for creating a new project, gathering metadata, initializing storage, and wiring autosave.

nodes.name: ExportDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog presenting export format and options selections backed by the settings store.

nodes.name: ExportReportDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Dialog generating an export report from the project snapshot, formatting entity labels and invoking export hooks.

nodes.name: EnhancedExportDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Enhanced export dialog with format selection, progress reporting, and canvas snapshot generation.

nodes.name: ExportConfirmationDialogs.tsx
nodes.summary: Collection of small confirmation dialogs for export edge cases: empty canvas, large file warning, errors, and unsaved changes.

nodes.name: PrintDialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Print dialog configuring page options and generating a canvas snapshot for printing.

nodes.name: ProjectSetupWizard.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-step wizard for configuring a new project's metadata and calculation settings using system templates.

nodes.name: utils.ts
nodes.summary: Shared utility providing the cn class-name merge helper (clsx + tailwind-merge) used across UI components.

nodes.name: useProjectStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store holding the current project metadata and selection state for dashboard/project flows.

nodes.name: useViewportStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store tracking viewport state such as zoom and pan offsets.

nodes.name: downloadProjectFile
nodes.summary: Triggers a browser download of serialized project text using an anchor element fallback.

nodes.name: saveProjectToExistingHandleOrDownload
nodes.summary: Writes the project to a remembered file handle if available, otherwise falls back to a download.

nodes.name: saveProjectAsAndRememberHandle
nodes.summary: Prompts the user with a save picker, writes the project, and caches the resulting file handle.

nodes.name: openProjectFromPicker
nodes.summary: Opens a project file via the file picker, reads and deserializes it, and remembers the handle.

nodes.name: BackupManager
nodes.summary: Service class providing full backup lifecycle: create, restore, delete, list, pre-migration snapshots, rollback, import/export, validation, and storage cleanup.

nodes.name: SystemTemplateService
nodes.summary: Service class managing HVAC calculation-setting templates with default initialization, CRUD, application to settings, and import/export.

nodes.name: AccordionLibrary
nodes.summary: React component rendering an accordion library of fittings and components for canvas insertion.

nodes.name: BulkEditDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog component for bulk-editing properties of multiple selected entities.

nodes.name: CalculationSettingsDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog for configuring HVAC calculation settings across tabbed sections with template support.

nodes.name: DuctSizePromptDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog prompting for duct shape and dimensions during drawing.

nodes.name: DuctToolOptionsPanel
nodes.summary: React panel exposing duct-tool options bound to canvas store state.

nodes.name: EquipmentPlacementDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog for selecting and configuring equipment before canvas placement.

nodes.name: TabbedPropertiesPanel
nodes.summary: React inspector component organizing entity property editors into tabs.

nodes.name: ResolutionWizard
nodes.summary: React wizard component for resolving component validation issues.

nodes.name: componentToFormData
nodes.summary: Maps a unified component into editable service form data fields.

nodes.name: ServiceEditor
nodes.summary: React dialog component for creating and editing HVAC services/components.

nodes.name: ServiceList
nodes.summary: React component listing services/components with edit and delete actions.

nodes.name: SystemTemplateSelector
nodes.summary: React dialog for browsing and applying system calculation-setting templates.

nodes.name: ConfirmDialog
nodes.summary: Generic React confirmation dialog component.

nodes.name: DeleteConfirmDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog requiring typed confirmation to delete a project.

nodes.name: EditProjectDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog for editing project metadata and settings.

nodes.name: NewProjectDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog for creating a new project and initializing its storage and autosave.

nodes.name: ExportDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog for choosing export format and options.

nodes.name: ExportReportDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog generating an export report from the project snapshot.

nodes.name: EnhancedExportDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog providing enhanced export with progress and snapshot generation.

nodes.name: PrintDialog
nodes.summary: React dialog configuring print options and generating a canvas snapshot.

nodes.name: ProjectSetupWizard
nodes.summary: Multi-step React wizard for configuring new project metadata and calculation settings.

nodes.name: cn
nodes.summary: Merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
